sentences.target: Ich warte im Stiegenhaus auf den Kurier.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈvaʁtə ɪm ˈʃtiːɡn̩haʊs aʊf deːn kuˈʁiːɐ̯/

translations.de: Ich warte im Stiegenhaus auf den Kurier.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈvaʁtə ɪm ˈʃtiːɡn̩haʊs aʊf deːn kuˈʁiːɐ̯/
translations.en: I'm waiting in the stairwell for the courier.
translations.es: Estoy esperando al repartidor en la escalera.
translations.fr: J'attends le livreur dans la cage d'escalier.
translations.pt: Estou esperando o entregador na escada.
translations.vi: Tôi đang đợi người giao hàng ở cầu thang.
translations.ar: أنا أنتظر عامل التوصيل في درج البناية.
translations.nl: Ik wacht in het trappenhuis op de koerier.
translations.hi: मैं कुरियर का इंतज़ार सीढ़ियों में कर रहा हूँ।
translations.pl: Czekam na kuriera w klatce schodowej.
translations.nb: Jeg venter på budet i trappeoppgangen.
translations.sv: Jag väntar på kuriren i trapphuset.
translations.da: Jeg venter på buddet i opgangen.
translations.ja: 配達員を階段で待っています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the finite verb.
Finite main verb, present indicative 1st person singular; sentence predicate.
Contracted preposition (in + dem), introduces a locative PP; governs dative.
Common noun (neuter); object of the preposition 'im' in dative; place of waiting.
Preposition selected by 'warten', introduces its complement; governs accusative.
Definite article, accusative masculine singular; determiner of 'Kurier'.
Common noun (masculine); complement of 'auf' in accusative (entity awaited).

sentences.target: Im Stiegenhaus riecht es nach frischer Farbe.
sentences.reading: /ɪm ˈʃtiːɡn̩haʊs ʁiːçt ɛs nax ˈfʁɪʃɐ ˈfaʁbə/

translations.de: Im Stiegenhaus riecht es nach frischer Farbe.
translations.ipa: /ɪm ˈʃtiːɡn̩haʊs ʁiːçt ɛs nax ˈfʁɪʃɐ ˈfaʁbə/
translations.en: It smells like fresh paint in the stairwell.
translations.es: En la escalera huele a pintura fresca.
translations.fr: Ça sent la peinture fraîche dans la cage d'escalier.
translations.it: Nelle scale si sente odore di vernice fresca.
translations.zh-Hans: 楼道里有股新油漆的味道。
translations.pt: Na escada cheira a tinta fresca.
translations.he: בחדר המדרגות יש ריח של צבע טרי.
translations.tr: Merdiven boşluğunda taze boya kokusu var.
translations.vi: Trong cầu thang có mùi sơn mới.
translations.ar: تفوح رائحة طلاء جديد في درج البناية.
translations.nl: In het trappenhuis ruikt het naar verse verf.
translations.hi: सीढ़ियों में ताज़ा पेंट की गंध आ रही है।
translations.pl: W klatce schodowej pachnie świeżą farbą.
translations.nb: Det lukter fersk maling i trappeoppgangen.
translations.id: Di tangga tercium bau cat baru.
translations.ro: În casa scării miroase a vopsea proaspătă.
translations.cs: Na schodišti je cítit čerstvá barva.
translations.da: Der lugter af frisk maling i opgangen.
translations.ja: 階段は新しいペンキのにおいがします。

tokens.explanation: Contracted preposition (in + dem), introduces a locative PP; governs dative.
Common noun (neuter); object of 'Im' in dative; topicalized location.
Finite verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; impersonal usage.
Expletive pronoun; syntactic subject placeholder in impersonal construction.
Preposition expressing smell/source; governs dative.
Attributive adjective, dative feminine singular; modifier of 'Farbe'.
Common noun (feminine); complement of 'nach' in dative.

sentences.target: Die Nachbarin singt laut im Stiegenhaus.

translations.de: Die Nachbarin singt laut im Stiegenhaus.
translations.en: The neighbor is singing loudly in the stairwell.
translations.es: La vecina canta fuerte en la escalera.
translations.fr: La voisine chante fort dans la cage d'escalier.
translations.it: La vicina canta forte sulle scale.
translations.zh-Hans: 邻居在楼道里大声唱歌。
translations.yue: 鄰居喺樓梯間大聲唱歌。
translations.pt: A vizinha está cantando alto na escada.
translations.tr: Komşu merdiven boşluğunda yüksek sesle şarkı söylüyor.
translations.vi: Cô hàng xóm hát to ở cầu thang.
translations.ar: الجارة تغني بصوت عالٍ في درج הבناية.
translations.nl: De buurvrouw zingt hard in het trappenhuis.
translations.hu: A szomszédasszony hangosan énekel a lépcsőházban.
translations.hi: पड़ोसन सीढ़ियों में ज़ोर से गा रही है।
translations.pl: Sąsiadka głośno śpiewa w klatce schodowej.
translations.el: Η γειτόνισσα τραγουδάει δυνατά στο κλιμακοστάσιο.
translations.ro: Vecina cântă tare în casa scării.
translations.ja: 隣の人が階段で大きな声で歌っています。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative feminine singular; determiner of 'Nachbarin'.
Common noun (feminine); sentence subject in nominative singular.
Finite main verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; predicate.
Adverb of manner modifying 'singt'.
Contracted preposition (in + dem), introduces a locative PP; governs dative.
Common noun (neuter); object of 'im' in dative; location of action.

sentences.target: Wir stellen das Fahrrad ins Stiegenhaus.

translations.de: Wir stellen das Fahrrad ins Stiegenhaus.
translations.en: We're putting the bike in the stairwell.
translations.es: Metemos la bicicleta en la escalera.
translations.fr: On met le vélo dans la cage d'escalier.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们把自行车放在楼道里。
translations.yue: 我哋將單車擺喺樓梯間。
translations.pt: Estamos colocando a bicicleta na escada.
translations.he: אנחנו שמים את האופניים בחדר המדרגות.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi để chiếc xe đạp ở cầu thang.
translations.nl: We zetten de fiets in het trappenhuis.
translations.hi: हम साइकिल को सीढ़ियों में रख रहे हैं।
translations.ja: 自転車を階段に置きます。
